---
title: "Matthew Schoen"
image: Images/mes_headshot.JPEG 
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-alt: "Matthew Schoen Headshot"
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: hhtps://github.com
      target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthew-schoen-sustainability/
      target: _blank
    - text: Contact Me!
      href: mailto:meschoen76@gmail.com
body-classes: default-page
navbar:
  pinned: True
---

:::{.text-panel-wide}

Hi, I’m Matthew! 

I'm a fourth year Environmental Studies undergraduate at the University of California, Santa Barbara, passionate about turning sustainability strategy into real-world impact. My experience ranges from corporate sustainability operations and supply chain initiatives at Kohler Co. to on-the-ground coalition building for community efforts such as farmers markets, environmental education campaigns, and the nation's first university shoe recycling program!  

I’m drawn to project management within Sustainability/ESG, especially within the tech, automotive, and textile industries - spaces where innovation, systems thinking, and environmental responsibility must evolve together to meet changing regulations and global demands. My background gives me a well-rounded perspective on how sustainability functions from both the ground-up and the top-down.  

I bring an upbeat, collaborative leadership style and thrive in cross-functional environments where clear communication and execution matter. My interests include the circular economy, renewable energy and resources, and sustainable operations but I’m more than happy to talk about anything & everything track & field, cars, or photography!

Always open to connecting, learning, and collaborating on ideas that move sustainability forward & make an impact! 

:::
